params.name: Ram in a Thicket
params.description: Ram in a Thicket, unearthed from the Royal Tombs of Ur, are among the emblems of the Ur civilization. The artifact takes the form of a tree adorned with fruits made of gold and silver, beneath which stands a goat crafted from gold and gems, materials of immense value. The Golden Goat and the Sacred Tree are not only showcases of exquisite craftsmanship but also symbols of religion and myth. In Sumerian culture, trees often symbolize life and fertility, while goats represent the power of Divinity …
